blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I've been in love with you since before I had a word for it.

The first firework went up from somewhere across town — the municipal display, distant, a bloom of gold spreading over the tree line. Someone in the group cheered. Then Eli's voice, announcing two minutes out.
He reached out and brushed her hair back from her face — slow, no rush in it — and she didn't look away. The fire behind them. The fireflies around them.

Eli's first firework cracked open above them — white and gold, splitting the dark, the whole sky going bright — and the field filled with light and sound and Daisy was still looking at him and he was still looking at her.
